entity.label: Hamath-zobah
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Fortress of Zobah, (2 Chr. 8:3) is supposed by some to be a different place from the foregoing; but this is quite uncertain.

nodes.label: Hamath-zobah
nodes.description: Fortress of Zobah, (2 Chr. 8:3) is supposed by some to be a different place from the foregoing; but this is quite uncertain.

verses.text: And Solomon went to Hamathzobah, and prevailed against it.
